_about: Icon of the day. Each entry renders via Wikimedia Commons' stable Special:FilePath URL (resolved by file title, served at a sensible width). If an entry has a local "src" (e.g. "art/my-icon.jpg"), that is used instead — drop your own images into an art/ folder and add entries to use them. The renderer advances to the next entry if an image fails to load.
_attribution: Images via Wikimedia Commons; see each entry's page for its licence. Ancient icons are in the public domain; some photographs of mosaics/frescoes are under a Creative Commons licence by the photographer.

icons.title: Christ Pantocrator
icons.note: Encaustic icon, 6th c., St Catherine's Monastery, Sinai

icons.title: The Holy Trinity
icons.note: Andrei Rublev, c. 1411 (The Hospitality of Abraham)
